zh.lifeSummary: 當William De Weston於大約1270年出生在英國英格蘭素可瓦恩哈姆時，他的父親William De Weston37歲，母親Joan de Pontisse16歲。他於大約1300年與Alice Boville在英國英格蘭素瑞結婚。他於1294年在英國英格蘭素可被列為escheator to the king。他去世於1360年之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William De Weston于大约1270年出生在英国英格兰素可瓦恩哈姆时，他的父亲William De Weston37岁，母亲Joan de Pontisse16岁。他于大约1300年与Alice Boville在英国英格兰素瑞结婚。他于1294年在英国英格兰素可被列为escheator to the king。他去世于1360年之前。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Weston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Weston, from Old English west ‘west’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

topographic name from Middle English atte west tun(e) ‘at the west farmstead, settlement’ (Old English west + tūn), or from Middle English (bi) weste(n)tune (Old English be westan tūne or be west in tūne), denoting someone who lived either to the west of a settlement or in the western part of a settlement. The latter was a common surname in Sussex.

variants.name: Wesson
meanings: English (Midlands and Kent): variant of   Weston  .
History: John Wesson came from England to Salem, MA, in 1644.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William De Weston was born about 1270, in Warnham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, William De Weston, was 37 and his mother, Joan de Pontisse, was 16. He married Alice Boville about 1300, in Surrey, England, United Kingdom. In 1294, at the age of 25, his occupation is listed as escheator to the king in Sussex, England, United Kingdom. He died before 1360.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William De Weston est né environ 1270, à Warnham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William De Weston, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Joan de Pontisse, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Alice Boville environ 1300, à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. En 1294, à l’âge de 25 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est escheator to the king à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé avant 1360.

de.lifeSummary: Als William De Weston um 1270 in Warnham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William De Weston 37 und seine Mutter Joan de Pontisse 16. Er hat um 1300 in Surrey, England, United Kingdom Alice Boville geheiratet. 1294, als er 25 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als escheator to the king in Sussex, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb vor 1360.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William De Weston è nato il circa 1270 nel Warnham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William De Weston, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Pontisse, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Alice Boville circa 1300, nel Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Nel 1294, all'età di 25 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come escheator to the king nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì prima del 1360.

ja.lifeSummary: William De Westonが約1270年にイギリスイギリススセックスワーンハムで生まれた時，父William De Westonは37歳，母Joan de Pontisseは16歳であった。約1300年にイギリスイギリススリーでAlice Bovilleと結婚した。1294年，25歳の時，イギリスイギリススセックスでの職業はescheator to the kingと記録されている。彼は1360年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William De Weston(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 워함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Weston(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Pontisse(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 Alice Boville(와)과 결혼했다. 1294년, 25세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 escheator to the king이었다. 그는 1360년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William De Weston nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Warnham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William De Weston, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Pontisse, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Boville aproximadamente 1300, em Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Em 1294, com 25 anos, sua profissão aparece como escheator to the king em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu antes 1360.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William De Weston родился около 1270 г. в местности варнам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William De Weston было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Pontisse, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Boville около 1300 г. в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания. В 1294 году, в возрасте 25 лет,  он работал по профессии escheator to the king в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер перед 1360 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William De Weston nació aproximadamente 1270, en Warnham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William De Weston, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Joan de Pontisse, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Alice Boville aproximadamente 1300, en Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. En 1294, a la edad de 25 años, su ocupación registrada era escheator to the king en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió antes de 1360.
